name: caja-image-converter
title: caja-image-converter
summary: Caja extension to mass resize or rotate images
description:
Caja extension to mass resize or rotate images
Caja is the official file manager for the MATE desktop. This
package adds extended functionality to the Caja file manager.
.
This package adds a "Resize Images..." menu item to the context menu of
all images. This opens a dialog where you set the desired image size
and file name. A click on "Resize" finally resizes the image(s) using
ImageMagick's convert tool.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use caja-image-converter because Caja extension to mass resize or rotate images.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use caja-image-converter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair caja-image-converter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caja-image-converter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
